title: The Selection
author: Henry David Thoreau
content: “Our life is frittered away by detail. Simplify, simplify, simplify!”

title: The Perception
author: William James
content: “The art of being wise is the art of knowing what to overlook.”

title: The Expression
author: Mark Twain
content: “Substitute 'damn' every time you're inclined to write 'very'; your editor will delete it and the writing will be just as it should be.”

title: The Truth
author: Flannery O'Connor
content: “The truth does not change according to our ability to stomach it.”
